summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with research and production experience developing ML models across computer vision, NLP, and generative AI. Built reproducible data pipelines scaling training datasets from hundreds to 10,000+ samples, trained ensemble models combining XGBoost with fine-tuned DistilBERT achieving 99.1% F1, and deployed production systems evaluated against rigorous held-out test sets. Comfortable working independently in research environments, handling messy real-world data, and communicating technical findings clearly to cross-functional stakeholders.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, XGBoost, HuggingFace Transformers, NumPy, Pandas, NLP, Computer Vision, Object Detection, Time Series, LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Prompt Engineering, Model Evaluation, SHAP, Explainable AI
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
